character.name:
TRUE pixel art with OCTOPATH TRAVELER character sprite color 
palette and pixel detail level (HD-2D 16-bit JRPG style), but 
with a STRICT FRONT-FACING NEUTRAL POSE for 8-direction rotation 
base sprite generation.

POSE — ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL:
- This is a SOUTH-FACING base sprite for 8-direction rotation
- Character body is squared DIRECTLY toward the viewer
- Both shoulders are equally visible at equal width 
  (shoulders parallel to camera plane)
- Head looks STRAIGHT FORWARD at the camera
- Both eyes equally visible from front
- Both feet visible facing forward, stance neutral and balanced
- NOT a dynamic action pose, NOT a 3/4 angled hero pose

WEAPON POSE:
- ONE-HANDED WARHAMMER held in the RIGHT HAND at the right side, 
  hammer head pointing slightly UPWARD AND OUTWARD 
  (NOT touching the ground, NOT shouldered)
- KITE SHIELD held on the LEFT ARM, shield face angled slightly 
  toward the camera, clearly visible from front
- Both arms relaxed at the sides, slightly bent
- Body squared forward, shoulders parallel to camera

PROPORTIONS:
- Tall sturdy adult human proportions, ~7-head ratio with a 
  SMALL HEAD relative to the body
- BROADER shoulders compared to other classes (heavier build), 
  but still slim enough to retain Octopath proportions
- Slim long torso, distinctly elongated legs
- Head occupies only ~1/7 of total character height

FACE — 16-bit JRPG MINIMALIST with DETAILED EYES:

EYES — anime-style with WHITE SCLERA and DARK PUPIL:
- Each eye approximately 3 pixels wide × 2-3 pixels tall
- WHITE SCLERA background with DARK BLACK PUPIL in the center
- Sharp 1-pixel dark outline around each eye
- Both eyes equally visible from front
- Lighter pale skin so WHITE SCLERA contrasts clearly

NO MOUTH — ABSOLUTE STRICT REQUIREMENT:
- The entire area below the eyes is COMPLETELY SMOOTH BLANK SKIN
- NO mouth line, NO lip shape, NO chin shading

NO NOSE — ABSOLUTE STRICT REQUIREMENT:
- NO nose bridge, NO nostril dots, NO nose shadow

Eyebrows: 1-2 short dark pixels above each eye (subtle).

HAIR:
- SHORT CROPPED DARK HAIR, slight individual strand definition
- A small dark FOREHEAD GUARD BAND visible across the brow 
  (no full helmet, face still visible)
- Hair does not cover the eyes

BODY AND EQUIPMENT (medium detail, secondary focus):
- Adult male, broad sturdy righteous build, mid-20s
- Heavy plate armor in DARK STEEL with TARNISHED GOLD trim along 
  the edges (chest, pauldrons, gauntlets, plated boots)
- OFF-WHITE CLOTH TABARD over the chest with a faded SUN EMBLEM 
  in dim gold (slightly stained, weathered)
- Brown leather belt over the tabard
- Warhammer: dark steel head, leather-wrapped grip
- Kite shield: dark steel face with a worn dim gold sun emblem 
  and iron rim

COLOR PALETTE:
- Tarnished gold trim and ivory tabard are LOW-SATURATION soft 
  contrast accents (no single dominant saturated color)
- Limited palette ~16-24 colors of dark steel, charcoal, dim 
  tarnished gold, off-white ivory, with skin tones for face only

RENDERING STYLE:
- Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
- Basic flat shading with subtle dithering, NO smooth gradients

CLEAN OUTPUT — STRICT:
★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY
★ ABSOLUTELY NO white specks, NO dust particles, NO sparkles, 
  NO stars, NO floating dots, NO noise pixels
★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0)
★ NO shadow on the ground
